## Checklist

- [ ] The entry is in the correct section.
- [ ] The link works and points to the canonical source.
- [ ] The description is concise, factual and ends with a period.
- [ ] A license is included for code projects (in backticks).
- [ ] The **Contents** table is updated if a new section was added.
